topic_category: red flag missed; normal-test trap; incomplete history
finding: Triage is a rapid risk sort, not a diagnosis; subtle chronic or complex symptoms may appear low acuity if vitals are normal.
what_happened: Classify acuity using ESI: immediate life-saving intervention, high risk/severe pain, then expected resources, with danger-zone vitals review.
research_topic: Real health-system patient flows for identifying health issues
what_was_identified: Identified: patients needing immediate lifesaving intervention and high-risk care; risk: triage depends on nurse pattern recognition and local resource assumptions.
what_was_missed: Identified: patients needing immediate lifesaving intervention and high-risk care; risk: triage depends on nurse pattern recognition and local resource assumptions.
cause_or_contributing_factor: red flag missed; normal-test trap; incomplete history
product_or_system_implication: Separate emergency risk score from diagnostic uncertainty; capture clinician concern and prior visits even when ESI level is lower.
notes: ESI is a documented front-door workflow; its resource prediction step can under-prioritize problems that need diagnostic synthesis rather than many ED resources.

research_topic: Real health-system patient flows for identifying health issues
person_or_group_involved: registered clinician / senior nurse / RAT team
what_was_identified: Identified: sickest patients and appropriate service route; risk: redirection decisions can become unsafe if not clinically governed.
what_was_missed: Identified: sickest patients and appropriate service route; risk: redirection decisions can become unsafe if not clinically governed.

topic_category: arrival; registration; red flag missed; poor handoff
finding: Operational queues can hide clinical risk before the patient is visible to the triage system.
what_happened: Register quickly, perform initial assessment by trained registered clinician, record minimum clinical fields and use early warning scores where relevant.
research_topic: Real health-system patient flows for identifying health issues
what_was_identified: Identified: front-door risk; missed risk if queues are unmanaged before registration/assessment.
what_was_missed: Identified: front-door risk; missed risk if queues are unmanaged before registration/assessment.
cause_or_contributing_factor: arrival; registration; red flag missed; poor handoff
